cad_specification:
{
  "title": "Oval Solitaire Diamond Engagement Ring with Pave Band",
  "description": "Classic engagement ring featuring a four-prong oval center stone setting with a delicate pave diamond band. The ring has a yellow gold band with micro-pave diamonds extending halfway around the shank, and a raised cathedral-style setting for the center oval diamond.",
  "dimensions": {
    "width": 18,
    "height": 8,
    "depth": 2.5
  },
  "features": [
    "Four-prong oval center stone setting (approximately 8x6mm)",
    "Micro-pave diamond band with approximately 20-24 small diamonds",
    "Cathedral-style raised setting",
    "Tapered band width from 2.5mm to 1.8mm",
    "Comfort-fit interior band profile",
    "Standard ring size 6.5 (16.9mm diameter)"
  ],
  "material": "14K or 18K Yellow Gold",
  "file_format": "STEP",
  "complexity": "medium"
}
